description: Highlights a specific text portion of a paragraph element using pattern matching
utility: Apply effects or styling to specific text within a paragraph

arguments.name: paragraph
arguments.description: Variable reference to a paragraph element

arguments.name: pattern
arguments.description: Quoted text pattern to match and highlight

arguments.name: ordinal
arguments.description: 1-based occurrence index (which match to highlight if pattern appears multiple times)

alternates.description: Highlight first occurrence of pattern with default effect

alternates.syntax: fragment(para_1, "some text", 1, type(bounce), c(red), fc(yellow), t(2))
alternates.description: Highlight with bounce effect, red text on yellow background, 2 second duration

examples.scenario: Highlight word range in circle equation question and clear (equation of a circle lesson)
examples.expression:
fragment_3 = fragment(paragraph_1, range(2, 8), effect(highlight), c(darkred), fc(gold), t(1))
hidehighlight_3 = hidehighlight(fragment_3)

examples.scenario: Highlight circle keyword in diameter problem (circle from a diameter lesson)
Highlight axis intercepts phrase (axis intercepts lesson)
examples.expression: fragment_2 = fragment(paragraph_1, range(5, 10), effect(highlight), c(black), fc(gold), t(1))

examples.scenario: Highlight circle equation in position analysis problem (Point and Circle lesson)
examples.expression: fragment_1 = fragment(paragraph_1, range(12, 13), effect(highlight), c(black), fc(gold), t(1))
